programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: IceCub wants to prove how amazing his polar sniffing power is. By playing a mean birthday trick, Night Ninja tries to get An Yu to destroy the museum.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Reading, drawing, watering plants, running, dancing, making things, splashing in water and much much more. The squirrels tire themselves out. Duggee suggests a break to have a story with milk and cookies.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Frizzy's Treasure Hunt: While scuba diving over the reef, Frizzy swims off from her buddy Big Trev in search of hidden treasure and becomes lost underwater.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When beavers cause a power cut in Pontypandy, Norman suggests keeping Dilys’s frozen food cold outside, which turns out to be a very, very bad idea… / The Pontypandy Pioneers bake up a storm to earn their baking badge, but when a greasy oven bursts into flames, it’s time to call the rescue team!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale Of The Falling Rock
programme.desc: With a landslide about to fall into the valley, Peter and his friends realise that a hibernating Mrs Tiggy Winkle is in destruction's path! Can these friends avert disaster?

programme.title: Cookie Monster's Foodie Truck
programme.desc: Cookie Monster and Gonger get a call and take an order from their friend who needs help with making tostones with a side of mojo.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: When Daniel receives a gift from Grandpere, he wants more. Mom Tiger tells him that instead of thinking of what he doesn't have, he can think about what he does have. Daniel stops to appreciate his gift and loves it.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Between strange goings on, Nim makes a mythical monster and bakes a unicorn cheesecake. Helped by one of the Crafty Kids, Nim creates a phoenix sock puppet.

programme.title: Play School: What's Cooking?
programme.desc: Alex and Rachael are looking for a delicious drink and scrumptious snack to eat! Luckily, food lover Melissa Leong is here to help them make super green smoothies and pink dragon fruit muffins.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.sub-title: Playing Fetch With Wags And Captain Feathersword
programme.desc: Playing Fetch with Wags and Captain Feathersword: Yee Ha! The Wiggles sing along as their pickup truck rolls on by! Captain Feathersword teaches Wags to fetch with wild results. (S8, ep 22).

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas loses his voice trying to sing opera like his Italian friends, and tries to find a new way to pass on a very important message.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish is having a quiet day at home. Rosa is working, Pola is gardening. Bobby is counting is blocks, one to twenty-hundred... Tish keeps thinking of questions to ask.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish is struggling to get out of bed for this morning, and Tash shows up to help her.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Minty gets a birds-eye view of the Valley after being flung onto the back of a Baby BokChoydactyl.

programme.title: Andy's Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: Andy embarks on another exciting prehistoric adventure, travelling back 95 million years in search of an eggshell belonging to one of the biggest animals to ever walk the Earth.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to deliver a super fun singing valentine. But the problem is, they don’t know who it’s for. Or who it’s from. And Preston is racing to beat them to it!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel tells a tall mer-tale.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurant with Grandad, but it’s a little different than he’s used to… he’s going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's the day of the London Marathon but it will take hours before Daddy Pig crosses the finish line! Thankfully, Mummy Pig has a special bag full of goodies to keep everyone busy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig and her friends dress up as Romans for their historical re-enactment society, so Peppa and George decide to join in the fun.

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs help Mum babysit their delightfully cute, little neighbour Sally.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Grandad has cleared some caterpillars off his veg and safely put them in a box for rehoming, but when Stan checks, all he finds is a strange object...

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programme.desc: Hank doubts himself when he can’t find his lucky rubber duck, which he takes everywhere.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Mysterious moving objects and strange sand patterns have Frizzy convinced that Alien Koalas are invading Kangaroo Beach! But Gemma uncovers a much crabbier culprit!

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Humpback Whales
programme.desc: When a sardine swallows the key to a treasure chest, a humpback whale helps Kwazii track it down.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Doc Ock's digging in the ocean threatens a deep-sea jellyfish habitat.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: The kids play Café so Bingo can eat Pavlova, but Dad the chef never seems to get the order quite right! When Bluey fires him, Dad sets up his own competing shop next door.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: World Cup fever has taken over the Plaza! But when the live telecast is interrupted, Flower and Flour find a way for the whole plaza to have their own World Cup soccer match.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: When their garden vegetables are stolen, Cosima and Big Lizard become detectives.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee shows the Squirrels all the exciting things a ball can do, as we follow its journey from one character to the next!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben and Holly are having fun playing together in the meadow. Holly gets frustrated when Ben uses his elf skills to win all the games. Then Ben gets frustrated when Holly uses her magic skills to win all the games.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: At a neighbourhood toy trade, everybody wants Rhonda's stuffie Larry the Dog that she doesn't play with anymore. But they must convince Rhonda that their plans are worthy of Larry!

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: On Halloween Night, Poison Ivy brings all the pumpkins to life, creating an army of Snack-O-Lanterns that eat all the candy. It's up to Redbird and Bam to end her pumpkin panic to save Gotham's Halloween fun, as well as their own.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo as the other, more exciting injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The flock are enjoying a boogie when a freshly-dug molehill interrupts their fun. Shaun has to resort to ever more extreme attempts to get rid of the pesky mole.

programme.title: Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja confront Beatrix in the streets of the Imperium as Sora and Arin aid the resistance in hopes of turning the tide of battle.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Quirky Eggheads and Texas Snow Globes
programme.desc: After Dr Sturgis experiences a nervous breakdown, Mary worries Sheldon is headed down a similar path. Meanwhile, Georgie discovers he has a knack for sales.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Broom Closet And Satan’s Monopoly Board
programme.desc: A Broom Closet and Satan's Monopoly Board: Sheldon must find a new way to stay academically challenged. Mary helps Pastor Jeff to avoid temptation. (S3 Ep2).

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: A long lost relative of Steven's comes to town to aid him in unlocking the power of his mother's gem!

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven tries to avoid Connie so he doesn't have to tell her about his most recent harrowing adventure.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: King Snuggadoodle and the Huggaboopies invade Finn and Jake’s tree house.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Finn and Jake must survive the tests of the Fight King.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: Starfire plots a suitable super-hero revenge against her evil sister Blackfire after she is set up by her and is convicted and sent to prison, but Robin and the other teens decide to take Blackfire under wing and try and make her a better sister.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: Beast Boy is distressed by his big new battle scar, until Cyborg convinces him that the scar makes him look tough and manly. Now Beast Boy wants to look even tougher.

programme.title: Pokémon: Diamond and Pearl
programme.desc: Veilstone Gym Leader Maylene is back in action and ready to accept Ash's challenge for his third Sinnoh region Gym badge!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy and Kara race back to Metropolis to stop Brainiac's invasion of Earth! Meanwhile, Lois tries to free Clark from Brainiac's control.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: In Ninja-mode, Finn and Jake break into Ice King’s palace to catch him red-handed.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Jake pretends to be a rainicorn in order to make Lady’s parents like him.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: Susie holds the annual talent show that has the rest of the campers competing to win.

programme.title: The Strange Chores
programme.desc: SPHER-E, Helsing's new floating security orb, goes from BFF to Frenemy when it ejects everyone onto the lawn and takes over Helsing's house!

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Hoofius tries his magical panpipes on a quest.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Herbert’s desire to feel young puts a quest in jeopardy.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: When Chloe threatens to leave Paris, Mr Bourgeois gets akumatized into Maledikator. Invested with absolute power, he wants to make his daughter's dreams come true so that she stays with him! Will Ladybug manage to stop him?

programme.title: Total Dramarama
programme.desc: Gwen orders a personality modifying ray to tone her perky parents but decides to test it on the class first.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Bears switch bedrooms for the night and get a glimpse of the living space of one of their brothers. But the deeper they go, hidden secrets are revealed.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Baby Bears meet a group of helpless bunnies. When they find out the bunnies live in fear of vicious crows, the Bears decide to become heroes and help out.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: The Baby Bears help a teenager accomplish his dream of being a famous singer.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: When the Bears realize whatever they build with snow comes to life they decide to build the biggest snow party of all time.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Protect The Supreme Kai Gowasu Destroy Zamasu!
programme.desc: Supreme Kai Gowasu is in grave danger! Now that gods are involved, Zamasu's treachery isn't a mortal matter anymore. Beerus will have to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Into The Future Again Goku Black's True Identity Revealed!
programme.desc: Beerus is convinced that his actions should have influenced the future, but Future Trunks isn't so sure! Now it's time for Goku, Vegeta and Future Trunks to see for themselves - and Bulma is going, too!

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: A classy queen of etiquette makes the Utoniums question their superhero way of life.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: As the Regionals qualifier clashes with the Brawl's, A-Troupe struggles under the weight of all the secrets they've kept from each other.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: A Victorian businessman goes undercover in his own factory; there's a right royal squabble over who should rule medieval England and the Real Tudor Hustle reveals the cleverest con tricks by naughty historical criminals.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Olive and Otto interrogate two suspects to figure out which one is guilty.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Odd Squad must stop headquarters from being destroyed.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: Grid Legends & Jax's Australian Joy Flight
programme.desc: We review the pedal to the metal racing action of GRID Legends, and Jax goes for a joy flight to check out the sights around Australia in Microsoft Flight Simulator.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs Resume At 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.sub-title: The Missing Life Day Feast, The/ Lost Treasure Of Tenoo
programme.desc: The Jedi must stop pirates from ruining Life Day.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Octobella creates a powerful octopus crystal that makes her a bigger threat than ever.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: Thomas and Kana journey across Sodor to find the prize at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above And Beyond
programme.desc: Octo-Agent Min discovers a decimated bamboo forest, a habitat crucial to pandas, and alerts the Octonauts.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Mrs Figg's magic school is damaged, so a cake stall is organised to raise money for repairs, but no one can eat Queen Thistle's cakes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po needs an extra snooze before waking up for an energetic Tubby Phone dance.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo, Rosita, and Chris are making a doggy obstacle course for Tango. They find a hula hoop that Tango could jump through, but it won't stand up.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel and Jodi make a pretend city out of all of the blankets in the Platypus house. When it's nap time for Teddy and Leo, Jodi finds Leo's missing blankie for him to snuggle - that's what he needs to help him rest.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Morgan takes Amy to the Doctor Bananas new clinic at Rat's shop after she knocks her head on a tree. The Doctor Bananas, assisted by Nurse Rat, are very busy and discover at the Doctor Bananas clinic, laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Lulu wishes she was a princess so the Bananas play along with her, introducing her as the Princess Lulu. Amy and Morgan pretend to be a queen and an emperor and Rat decides to be President. The Bananas are happy to be just who they are.

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds discover some of the clever things that happen on railways! Two passenger trains become one in a faraway railway station, and then they see how freight trains move giant boxes all around the country!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle, when she realises everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join in the wiggly fun and explore The Wiggles' favourite activities, including jumping, running, and skipping. Wave to Bok the Dancing Puppet, while counting along with 'Eight Wiggles Dancing'!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It’s a quiet day, and the flock decides to entertain each other by performing their favourite party tricks. However, when the Farmer tries to join in, things get a little awkward.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington is accidentally delivered inside a wardrobe to Mr Curry's house. How will he get out before being discovered?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Lost Journal
programme.desc: When Benjamin accidentally loses Peter's dad's journal, it falls into the clutches of Mr Tod.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Catboy wants to prove himself a brave Cat Explorer and realises that a true Cat Explorer puts his team before the discovery.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Bryan the ferry can’t stop unless Mojo and Bo figure out how to get aboard and help him!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When the entire Mouse family is absolutely exhausted, Vida realizes it's because Baby Mouse is teething ... and crying all night! Luckily, she knows how to soothe Baby Mouse so her family can get the rest they need.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: While Flower, Penny, and Dirk head out for the day, Flour the cat sneaks off on his own mischievous adventure around the plaza.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and her playgroup kids discuss about the weather. Peppa's favourite weather is rain, Mandy's favourite is sun and Penny's favourite is snow.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Chloe tries to teach her Dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand or enjoy, until they both realise, they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: To plug an air vent at the bottom of the lake, Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes must seek the help of the mighty Watermelonsuchus!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Island Campout: Camping out overnight on Boomerang Island with the cadets, Frizzy goes on a late night hunt for an alien koala.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel tells a tall mer-tale.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: When a storm washes Peso onto a mysterious, rocky island, he meets a band of lobster-like insects thought to be extinct.

programme.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Rya, Kai, and Zee run a loud, colourful cafe with fried rice, fairy bread, and waiters who eat the food. It's chaotic, hilarious, and pure Chattermax energy.

programme.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programme.desc: Rangers Abi and Luke pack their bags with everything they need for all kinds of rainforest weather! They use different items to make storm sounds and tell the story of a sugar glider searching for somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: A pesky mole causes trouble for Moose when the mole decides that Moose's Wild Man Golf Course is the perfect place to build a few molehills.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: While Pranksy tries to paint a giant picture of Silver Paw on the playroom wall, Squash wishes he had his very own human to love him.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Ari has arranged a circus performance for the school children, but the circus has to cancel. Stan steps in to help Ari find some brilliant performers in the local community and make a very special show indeed.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Best Wedding
programme.desc: When Nikhil and Jay realise their parents had two weddings before they were born, they decide to plan them another wedding; the best wedding!

programme.title: Nature Explorers With Elmo, Gabrielle And Tango
programme.desc: When Grandma Nell invents the game \.

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: When Blueberry gets the hiccups and can't play with Mittens, the two set off to do everything they can to cure Blueberry, but nothing seems to work.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: BaBa has the hiccups. MeMo helps to make them disappear before BeddyByes time.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups visit a fruit nursery where they embark on a competition to see who can grow the tallest fruit tree, but when things go wrong, will the MixMups find \.

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie, Nina and Akil are exploring musical instruments. Eddie learns how to play the xylophone by looking, touching, playing, and finally - enjoying making music in a band.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo as the other, more exciting injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore a flower farm, meet some \.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Hair Dos: Nim is thinking of changing her look, leading to some transformational makes: a cup flower, pastry letters and an ice cream cart. (S2, ep 18).

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Lucia and Caterina are playing with blocks, but their Wiggle house keeps falling over, will Connie Struction, the structural engineer be able to help them build a stable Wiggle House?

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: There has been a big tropical storm at Safari World and Andy has made sure all the animals are safe and well. There is one nest he is not able to find: the nest of a storm petrel, which is a type of sea bird.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George's New Dinosaur: George pays a visit to Mr Fox's Shop after his favourite toy, Mr Dinosaur breaks. With all the additional features surely Dino Roar is a good replacement?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit's train has broken down with a carriage full of passengers who need to get to work. Grandpa Pig lends Miss Rabbit his little train Gertrude.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou fall down a hole into a cave, and are guided to safety by some singing glow worms.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Peas help a Bokchoydactyl retrieve its egg from a nest of Cucumberdiles.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: It's the Twin's birthday party and chaos ensues when their little friends arrive. The Wise Old Elf tries to entertain them, but they prove too much of a handful, turning the Wise Old Elf into a mouse.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Baby Mouse won't take a nap, Vida runs a sleep study to figure out what's keeping her up!

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie is at her Granny's house, and she's very bored. The only entertainment is the whistling sound from the old kettle.

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Triggs has lost his woof and needs to visit the vet. Maddie feels a little scared for her buddy, her song just doesn't sound right without him.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to see if she can practice her first aid skills on him, but he's all fit and healthy. Stanley and Myrtle get a call from Sophie and Little Woo at the school to install a basketball hoop.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: Running out of air, Barnacles struggles to free his paw from the mouth of a giant clam, while simultaneously directing his crew in a delicate Manatee rescue operation.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: By playing a mean birthday trick, Night Ninja tries to get An Yu to destroy the museum.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing saxophone, they want to have a go too. The squirrels make their own musical instruments, playing pots, balloons, tins, water and tubes, but boy are they loud!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Island Campout: Camping out overnight on Boomerang Island with the cadets, Frizzy goes on a late night hunt for an alien koala.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Mandy offers to look after Miss Pawdry, claiming that she's great with animals. But the cat escapes and ends up in a basket drifting towards the sea!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: After Benjamin gets lost in the woods, Peter and Lily give him a map to help him find his way home. But when the map falls into Mr Tod's hands, the rabbits must work together to stop the fox from finding their home.

programme.title: Cookie Monster's Foodie Truck
programme.desc: Cookie Monster and Gonger are Monster Foodies! They get a call and take an order from their friend who needs help with making a special dessert that's red to have at their family picnic to celebrate Juneteenth.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: When Miss Elaina needs a bandage on her hand, she notices that it isn't fair that there aren't any bandages that look like her skin color. With the help of her mom and Dr. Anna, they make custom bandages for Miss Elaina.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: After a scare from the Makery Tree, Nim sets to work making a spooky tree picture. She also bakes a pretzel spider web and creates a spooky top for one of the Crafty Kids.

programme.title: Play School: What's Cooking?
programme.desc: Time for dinner! Alex and Kaeng get a lesson in making roly poly rice paper rolls and yummy dipping sauce from legendary cook Nagi Maehashi. Alex, Kaeng and Nagi are joined by Nagi's best mate, Dozer, for a picnic dinner.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: The Mayor of Wiggle Town: It's election day and The Wiggles need to vote for the new mayor of Wiggle Town. Who will make Wiggle Town Mayor? Plus, enjoy fun at the beach. (S8, ep 23).

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Brenda learns it's important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Rosa and Tish have just arrived from the shops. Tish has brought a cuddly toy with her - a dragon.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Today Pola, Tish and Bobby are decorating a cake for Rosa. Tish suggests it should be a Fish Cake with a chocolate truffle as its eye.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When an egg cracks to reveal a baby Avocadodon, Ginger and the Pea-Rexes have to find a fun way to lead the energetic baby back to its herd.

programme.title: Andy's Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: When disaster strikes at the museum, Andy sets off on a prehistoric adventure using his time-travelling clock. Andy joins a herd of woolly mammoths 30,000 years in the past and bumps into one of his own ancient ancestors.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A camping trip with Preston goes very wrong when he won’t let them use Mojo’s tops. But camping Preston’s way soon starts a fire, and it’s Mojo and Bo to the rescue!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel has a houseguest.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: The kids play Café so Bingo can eat Pavlova, but Dad the chef never seems to get the order quite right! When Bluey fires him, Dad sets up his own competing shop next door.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Bird Spotting: Peppa and George go birdwatching with Grandpa Pig. Grandpa really wants to see a cuckoo, then he hears one calling.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit the cinema for the first time to watch the Super Potato movie!

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: It's a rainy day and Maddie + Triggs are bored, but when they start to really listen to all the tiny sounds in their house, they soon discover the music of the treasure indoors.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Stan keeps hearing the tune of an ice cream van but it's not there! Seals are singing, whistles are blowing and birds are barking! What's going on?

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programme.desc: Using her super-speed at a beach clean-up, Angela accidentally creates a giant whirlwind that threatens the event.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: What starts as a leisurely sailing trip for Frizzy, Spyke, Big Trev, and Aunty Bev takes a dangerous turn when their boat gets caught on the reef, and they find themselves racing against time!

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: Shellington and the Vegimals are on a mission to replant a mangrove forest.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Doc Ock's device controls the city's bats to steal things for her.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: While Flower, Penny, and Dirk head out for the day, Flour the cat sneaks off on his own mischievous adventure around the plaza.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Big Lizard doesn't seem happy in his own skin. Perhaps he'd be better off without it?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: After learning that Duggee is making his yearly batch of blueberry jam, a tradition passed on from his Great Aunt, the Squirrels decide to spread the news.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle has a cold and needs some medicine. Nanny Plum, Holly, and Ben, have a lot of fun collecting the ingredients to make a magic potion to cure his cold and make him better.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Buns gets picked last for a pick-up soccer game because her superhero duties cause her to lose focus. She's going to prove herself in goal and never be picked last again...until she notices a little cricket in harm's way!

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Bibi just can't put down her new exciting video game, even when MOE needs her help packing Bam's utility belt for a mission.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Intrigued by a horror film on TV, Timmy wanders into the farmhouse late one night. Shaun's rescue mission convinces the Farmer that the place is haunted.

programme.title: Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Empress Beatrix's rampage pushes the MergeQuakes dangerously close to the tipping point, unless the Ninja can work together — and save the world.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: An Entrepreneurialist and a Swat on the Bottom
programme.desc: Sheldon takes matters into his own hands when Meemaw refuses to drive him to a lecture; Georgie tries to impress Veronica with his new business venture.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Hobbitses, Physicses and a Ball With Zip
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with \.

programme.title: The Pets Factor
programme.desc: Cat fixes a Staffie's poorly ear with some unusual accessories, Cheryl helps an abandoned kitten and James has a lesson in hydrotherapy.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: The keepers hold their breath as one of the biggest and most loved characters at the park gets a visit from the vet.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: The keepers dare to believe that Yana, the Amur tiger, might be pregnant.

programme.title: Merlin (UK)
programme.desc: A mysterious visitor to Camelot claims to hold a magical secret that could change the kingdom forever, but can he be trusted?

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Still in Canada, Steve finds the biggest sea lion in the world; he is on the trail of the smelliest animal on the planet, the skunk; then tries his hand at becoming a raccoon; and tracks the powerful black bear.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: While Tikki isn't with her, Marinette finds out that a mysterious supervillain is bringing the Parisians' bad dreams to life.Will she manage to transform in time to put an end to this nightmare?

programme.title: Total Dramarama
programme.desc: When Beth, Duncan and Izzy break Cehef's new VR helmet they have to recreate his game world to keep him from ever finding out the truth.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated, Ice Bear leaves his brothers to be the chef of a restaurant. Desperate to fill the void, Grizz and Panda look for Ice Bear's replacement.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Grizz gets cast in a movie about a Grizzly Bear! But Grizz soon realises the movie's depiction of grizzly bears is not what he had in mind.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: A storm rolls in while the Bears are separated. Grizz looks after the Poppy Rangers; Panda is stuck with Charlie in his car, and Chloe and Ice Bear are in the city seeking a ride home.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears party it up with a living piñatas for Fiesta Day. Wanting the festivities to never end, Grizz wishes for it to be Fiesta Day everyday.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Zamasu's Ambition - The Awful Zero Mortal Plan Is Revealed
programme.desc: The future is unchanged, Black isn't what Goku had initially thought, and the situation has escalated to something more severe. With this new information, will the Saiyan trio fare better than before?

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: I Will Defend the World! Trunks' Furious Burst of Super Power!
programme.desc: Fighting rages on, and things are looking grim. They might not be able to win, but Future Trunks can at least defend the others while they escape! Time is running out, but a new strategy may be the key to victory.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.sub-title: Man Up 3: The Good, The Bad and the Manly
programme.desc: After Bubbles gets blasted with Man Boy's beard ray, she wreaks havoc in the most manly and adorable way possible.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Izzy tries to join Brawl, Olive considers moving to cheer, and Kenzie visits Pete.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: DI Bones investigates an unusual Victorian traffic accident; Prime Ministers Neville Chamberlain and Winston Churchill argue over what to do about Adolf Hitler; and we discover the horrible history of early Australia.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Two of Ms O's assistants accidentally find themselves on a mission.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Olive and Otto must stop a villain who has turned townspeople and agents invisible.

programme.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programme.sub-title: Far Changing Tides & The Great Demo Grab Bag
programme.desc: We review the atmospheric adventure and puzzles of FAR Changing Tides, and we dive into a batch of game demos to find some great new games to get excited for!

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs Resume At 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi help their friend find a rare creature.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Night Ninja kidnaps An Yu and takes overs mystery mountain. Teeny tries to save the day, but his anger keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: Nai's Balloon Blunder: Thomas and Kana are outside the big station staring at a billboard, advertising a train parade happening at Vicarstown that day.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above And Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts and Paani are on high alert for hurricane season. Dashi flies the Octoray through the eye of a storm, just in time to warn everyone that the hurricane is headed straight for the Florida Everglades!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The Witch Competition: A young witch is planning on moving into Mrs Witch's house so Mrs Witch comes out of retirement to save it.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's a windy day in Teletubbyland and Dipsy's hat blows away - oh no!

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: It's national bubble week and Rosita and Zoe want to fill all of Sesame Street with lots of bubbles. But they're tired from blowing bubbles.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: At school, Teacher Harriet shows the class what to do to stay safe during a fire drill. While Daniel and his friends are playing, the fire alarm starts to ring, and the class practises their fire drill.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Teddies want to surprise the Bananas with a new dance. They ask them to come over for a \.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas think it will be easy to look after the new pet Flash the Fish they've just bought from Rat in a Hat's shop. But when they get him home, they realise they've got nowhere to put him and don't know what to feed him.

programme.title: Bing MAIN
programme.desc: Bing, Pando, Flop and Padget are on the seaside bus when it breaks down. Bing is disappointed, but cheers up when the driver lets Bing sit in her seat, beep the horn and use her special ticket!

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds meet a bee and follow it home to it's hive! They watch bees collect nectar, make honey, protect the hive, and care for babies - all in their buzzing bee kingdom.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster the vet comes to Peppa's playgroup to show the children her pets. But Tiddles has run away. But Ms. Rabbit is going to rescue Tiddles.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: John seeks help from Fruity and Fresca, the strength specialists, as he faces a challenge of losing strength due to missing breakfast. Explore the letter 'R' then sing-along to the 'Banananana' song!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun and Nuts have had enough of being grazers and decide to raid the Farmer's apple crop.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Jonathan and Paddington dig up some broken pottery. It turns out it's not Roman, but a statue made by Mrs Brown. But who broke it? Was it Judy's guilty secret? Or was it Mr Brown?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale Of The Missing Ducklings
programme.desc: A simple matter of duckling-sitting turns into a potential disaster when the ducklings escape into the wood.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: The PJs offer to help Motsuki find Luna but they don't listen to the stressed out little moth, so they miss a plot by Night Ninja right under their noses.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Fabio’s sticky sauce gets him stuck to Mojo. Is there really no way to unstick them?

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Tidbit is very serious about using sunscreen and even asks Vida to apply it to his shell. But when he gets distracted while having fun in the sun, a sunburn appears and he needs Vida's help again.

programme.title: Flower & Flour
programme.desc: Flower must bring a dish representing her family to a school picnic, but how can she choose when she loves both Dad's Austrian and Mum's Cantonese cooking equally? Time to get creative!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle has organised a Roller Disco for the children.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Split has an itch but can't find his scratching stick - turns out its nesting season so all the Bokchoydactyls have cleared the valley of sticks so Ginger and the Pea-Rexes have to get creative to help relieve Split.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Sandy's Surf School: When Neville fails to learn how to surf as well as his friends, he builds a self-surfing surfboard - but it quickly lands him in hot water.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel has a houseguest.

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts evacuate the creatures living around a reef before a large archway collapses, but one stubborn convict fish refuses to move from her burrow.

programme.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programme.desc: Willow, Olive, and Poppy serve tropical dishes poolside - until a surprise swim turns their romantic cafe into a splashy, unforgettable family moment.

programme.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programme.desc: Rangers Leah and Luke show us how we can all help care for the rainforest. They build a walkway to help protect plants and animals, make a tasty snack using macadamia nuts and figs, and clear weeds from the forest floor.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: It's the Annual Pontypandy Bread Baking Competition and Hannah's ambition accidentally causes her to spark a wildfire.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Moss must confront her fear of the dark when the kids have a living room campout, and Pranksy tries to spook them back to their beds.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley gives the town hall a new paint job as per Myrtle's request.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Lucky Striker
programme.desc: Jay wins at carrom with Ammamma’s lucky striker! Can he still win without it?

programme.title: Nature Explorers With Elmo, Gabrielle And Tango
programme.desc: When Rosita joins the Nature Explorers for a quick game of soccer, she finds a surprise waiting on her soccerball. It's a butterfly! Butterflies don't play soccer do they?

programme.title: Mittens & Pants
programme.desc: Mittens rides along with Fire Chief Grapefruit for the day. But the Fire Chief gets worried when Mittens begins rescuing things from high places, in a way he's never been able to do.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: It’s a windy day, and MeMo and BaBa have fun playing with the wind in many different ways: blowing pinwheels, flying kites, and even making musical wind chimes with the Yummies.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups visit a zoo to see if they can see a real tiger. The Zoo Keeper Lucky Loover Bird takes them on safari but the tigers won't come out of hiding. Can the Mixmups find another way to entice them out?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Taking the train to Grandpa's house is so exciting! Eddie prepares for the journey by learning about speed and the possible events during the journey.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: Fizzy And Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds ride tractors of all sizes! They watch huge wheels, harvest wheat in neat rows, and see a tractor pull a stuck vehicle out of mud - a mighty tractor rescue on the farm!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Great Pie-dea!: Nim has been cooking, giving The Makery some fantastic ideas. Today they make a fruit pie, a bread cauldron and an aeroplane costume. (S2, ep 19).

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: John, Evie, Caterina and Captain are enjoying playtime with their Wiggly dolls, but there is a problem: their dolls are feeling tired and sore. Will Dr. Lynn Burr be able to make the dolls feel better?

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: After a tropical rain during the night at Safari World, Andy has been making sure all the animals are safe. Apart from being a little damp, thankfully they're all okay.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: With Mojo and Bo’s help, Ted dresses up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, and swashbuckling Captain Dot hijacks him. Team Mojo must find their inner pirates and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There is a pet competition at playgroup, and everyone has brought in their pets. Dr Hamster is the judge but finds it hard to choose the best pet...

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig finds a spider in the house and orders Daddy Pig to get rid of it. Mr Skinny-Legs is set free in the garden, where he can spin all the webs he likes, wherever he likes.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri is bored but she learns that every day, there are new and interesting things to discover.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Peas embark on an underground chase in pursuit of a burrowing Aritchokus.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy's dad begins digging up the meadow, placing the Little Kingdom in grave danger, so the gang tries to find a way to stop him without being discovered.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Grandpa Beaver has a leak in his dam. It's up to Vida and the Sweetwood Explorers to help him!

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs sneak out of bed in search of a tasty midnight feast. But can they creep past Mum and Dad’s room without making a noise? And more importantly, can they figure out why two of the crispy buns are already missing?

programme.title: Maddie & Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, Triggs and Dad are making a special cake for Granny. Dad is extremely careful about following the recipe, but Maddie has a slightly looser approach. Okay, a lot looser… Will their new bonkers cake pass the Granny test?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: There is a phantom knitter decorating the town's buildings with super-size creations! Stanley and Fifi play detective to solve all the clues and discover who's behind it all!

programme.title: The Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts must figure out how to get a gigantic saltwater crocodile back home.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Power Heroes
programme.desc: Newton wants to check out an asteroid but it's a trap.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Sandy's Surf School: When Neville fails to learn how to surf as well as his friends, he builds a self-surfing surfboard - but it quickly lands him in hot water.
